POlicY & Terms

Last updated: [12, 2025]

Local Social Marketing LLC respects your privacy and is committed to protecting the personal information you share with us. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and how we keep it safe.

By using our website or submitting any form on localsocialmarketingllc.com, you agree to the practices described below.

Information We Collect

We collect information you voluntarily provide when you:

• Fill out a contact or inquiry form
• Request a strategy call or demo
• Subscribe to email updates
• Communicate with us by phone, email, or text

This information may include your name, business name, email address, phone number, and details about your project or services you are interested in. We may also collect basic usage data such as browser type, device type, pages visited, and general location to help improve site performance and user experience.

How We Use Your Information

We use your information to: • Respond to inquiries and requests • Schedule calls and consultations • Provide proposals, services, and support • Send relevant updates or follow-up emails • Improve our website, services, and communication We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information.

Email and Text Communication

By submitting your information, you agree to receive communications from Local Social related to your inquiry or services. These may include emails, phone calls, or text messages. You may unsubscribe from email communications at any time by clicking the unsubscribe link or contacting us directly. We do not send spam. Ever.

How We Use Your Information

We use your information to: • Respond to inquiries and requests • Schedule calls and consultations • Provide proposals, services, and support • Send relevant updates or follow-up emails • Improve our website, services, and communication We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information.

How We Protect Your Information

We take reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, misuse, or disclosure. While no online system is 100 percent secure, we use trusted platforms and best practices to safeguard your data.

Your Rights

You may request to: • Access the information we have about you • Correct or update your information • Request deletion of your information To do so, contact us at the email listed below.

Updates to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.

General Service Commitment

Local Social Marketing LLC provides digital marketing, web design, video production, branding, advertising, and related creative services as outlined in written agreements, proposals, invoices, or scopes of work. All services are delivered according to the agreed timeline, scope, and availability of required materials.

Client Responsibilities

Clients agree to provide accurate information, timely approvals, and access to locations, platforms, accounts, or materials necessary to complete services. Delays caused by missing information, unavailability, or lack of access may impact delivery timelines.

Payments, Refunds & Cancellations

Due to the nature of digital and creative services, all payments are final once work has begun. This includes strategy, planning, design, development, filming, editing, advertising setup, and consulting time.

Cancellations must be submitted in writing. Any cancellation requests received fewer than 14 days before a scheduled service, shoot, or campaign start date may not be eligible for a refund. Ongoing services may be subject to minimum commitment periods as outlined in individual agreements.

Intellectual Property & Usage Rights

All creative materials, concepts, drafts, templates, source files, raw footage, and working files remain the property of Local Social Marketing LLC until full payment has been received.

Upon full payment, ownership of final approved deliverables transfers to the client for their intended business use. Local Social Marketing LLC retains the right to display completed work in portfolios, case studies, and marketing materials unless otherwise agreed in writing. Cancellations must be submitted in writing. Any cancellation requests received fewer than 14 days before a scheduled service, shoot, or campaign start date may not be eligible for a refund. Ongoing services may be subject to minimum commitment periods as outlined in individual agreements.

Third-Party Platforms & Tools

Local Social Marketing LLC is not responsible for changes, outages, policy updates, or performance issues caused by third-party platforms such as Google, Meta, hosting providers, advertising platforms, or software tools. Results may vary based on market conditions, competition, and platform algorithms.

Limitation of Liability

Local Social Marketing LLC shall not be held liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use of our services, delays, technical issues, or third-party platform changes. Total liability, if any, shall not exceed the amount paid for services rendered.

Confidentiality

Both Local Social Marketing LLC and the client agree to keep confidential any proprietary, sensitive, or non-public information shared during the course of the business relationship, unless disclosure is required by law.

Governing Law

These Service Terms & Policies are governed by the laws of the State of Florida. Any disputes arising from services provided by Local Social Marketing LLC shall be resolved in Palm Beach County, Florida.

  • Local Social Marketing helps Palm Beach businesses grow with web design, videography, and digital marketing.
